metadata.name: ww-text
metadata.description: An HTML text element with multi-language support and configurable HTML tag.
features: Multiple HTML tag options (p, h1-h4, button, div, span)

properties.name: tag
properties.description: HTML tag to render the text element as

properties.name: text
properties.description: Text content as a multi-language object mapping language codes to values, e.g. {'en': 'Hello', 'fr': 'Bonjour'}. The 'text' property itself is NOT bindable: bind each language value individually (e.g. path 'content.default.text.en' with a formula returning a string), never bind the whole 'text' object (path 'content.default.text') to a formula.

specifications: The 'text' property itself is not bindable: binding it (e.g. path 'content.default.text' with a formula) throws an error. Only its per-language values are bindable.
To bind text dynamically, bind the language value: path 'content.default.text.en' with a formula/JS that returns a string. Never bind 'content.default.text' to a formula that returns an object.
Available languages are defined in the Page Info variable. Use only these languages in the text object.
Use appropriate heading tags (h1-h4) for semantic HTML structure
